title: Fall Protection at Steel Erection Perimeter
description: Reviewed OSHA 1926 Subpart R requirements for structural steel erection. Covered 100% tie-off requirements at leading edges. Demonstrated proper positioning lanyard and self-retracting lifeline use at column climbs. Reviewed procedures for perimeter cable removal and reinstallation during concrete pours.
notes: All ironworkers masonry and concrete crews attended. 3 workers required refresher demonstration on harness inspection. Distributed updated fall protection procedure card for concrete pour days. All signed attendance sheet.
project_name: Federal District Courthouse & Public Safety Complex

title: Davis-Bacon Prevailing Wage Worker Rights
description: Reviewed Davis-Bacon Act requirements and worker rights under federal prevailing wage law. Covered proper wage classification for each trade. Explained certified payroll process and how to verify correct wage rates. Reviewed complaint procedures if workers believe they are being underpaid.
notes: All craft workers attended in 3 sessions due to size. Davis-Bacon compliance consultant facilitated session. Distributed prevailing wage rate cards by trade. 6 workers requested individual wage classification review - all were confirmed correctly classified.
project_name: Federal District Courthouse & Public Safety Complex

title: Section 3 Program Overview and Hiring Goals
description: Explained HUD Section 3 program requirements and project hiring goals. Covered how Section 3 new hires are identified and tracked. Reviewed 25% labor hour goal and current project standing at 8.2%. Discussed local workforce development partners and referral process for Section 3 candidates.
notes: Foremen and supervisors attended plus all Section 3 workers. HUD program manager Sloane attended via phone. Commitment secured from all foremen to prioritize Section 3 candidates for open positions. 3 foremen provided names of qualified community candidates for follow-up.
project_name: Federal District Courthouse & Public Safety Complex

title: Electrical Safety - Energized Work and LOTO
description: Covered NFPA 70E arc flash requirements applicable to courthouse electrical installation. Reviewed lockout-tagout procedures for energized panels already in service. Covered proper PPE selection based on arc flash hazard analysis. Reviewed incident energy analysis for B1 switchgear room.
notes: All electricians and MEP workers attended. Updated LOTO procedures posted at all energized panels. Arc flash labels installed on all live panels. 4 workers required new arc flash PPE - ordered same day.
project_name: Federal District Courthouse & Public Safety Complex
